purpose: Shared contracts for portable source manifests, page-work manifests, vision evidence, and lifecycle invalidation.

source_revision_id_derivation.active_source_rule: source_id + canonical_locator + sha256 + acquired_at, serialized canonically and hashed or slugged deterministically
source_revision_id_derivation.pending_source_rule: source_id plus explicit pending/unavailable lifecycle state and date; pending IDs are never accepted as verified authority
source_revision_id_derivation.live_copyparty_uri_note: A Copyparty URL is a locator only. Authority comes from source_revision_id, sha256, permission basis, and page evidence.

missingness_rules.unknown: Allowed only in raw/page evidence or blocked manifests; not allowed in accepted app-facing facts.
missingness_rules.blocked: Requires blockers[] and lifecycle state that prevents promotion.
missingness_rules.unverified: Allowed only before verified/normalized/accepted states; never allowed in governed app-facing records.
missingness_rules.not_applicable: Allowed when a schema field genuinely does not apply and a rationale is present.
missingness_rules.absent_optional: Allowed only for optional fields declared by this schema.

excerpt_budgets.long_prose_fallback: Record source revision, page, block id, region, excerpt hash, and bounded excerpt only.

canonical_json.serialization: UTF-8 JSON with sorted object keys, no insignificant whitespace, NFC-normalized strings before hashing.
canonical_json.fact_id_rule: {namespace}:{source_id}:{stable_slug}:{field}; namespaces are owned in provenance schema.

promotion_protocol.stale_base_action: reject promotion and rebase/regenerate from current tree
promotion_protocol.parallel_agent_rule: No agent may promote accepted facts from an obsolete base tree hash.

source_manifest.portable_locator_rule: No machine-local absolute paths in canonical_locator or local_hint.

page_coverage.non_contributing_rule: contributes:false requires exclusion_reason and does not require derived facts.

verification_artifact.independence_rule: Verifier must not use extractor output, extractor scratchpad, extractor rationale, or the same run id/prompt context.
